caption: A man wearing a dark blue t-shirt and white gaming headphones is seen in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom left of the screen. He is seated in a room with a white brick wall and a decorated Christmas tree visible to his left. The main background is a vibrant purple and red gradient. Across the top of the screen, text displays "SUBSTITUTION" on the left and various stats on the right, including "173,037", "0", "14,609", "2,343,543", "LVL 19", and "91". The word "ULTIMATE TEAM" is faintly visible in the background. As the sequence progresses, the top text "SUBSTITUTION" remains consistent, but in the final frame, the text on the left changes to "LINEUP". Below this, a navigation menu appears with the options "OFFENSE", "DEFENSE", "SPECIAL TEAMS", "SPECIALISTS", "STRATEGY", and "VISUALS". The man in the window remains relatively still, speaking toward the camera.
